name: Asian Chicken Pot Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 boneless, skinless chicken breasts (6 ounces each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken breasts into 2-inch strips.
2. Cut all vegetables into 2-inch strips and blanch them.
3. In a large skillet over high heat, saute the chicken strips with vinegar.
4. Add cornstarch. Season with Chinese 5 spice powder, salt, and pepper.
5. Add garlic, onion, and ginger. Stir-fry for 5 to 6 minutes.
6. Add chicken stock and vegetables. Cook for 8 to 10 minutes.
7. Check seasoning and chill the mixture.
8. Layer four 1/2-inch sheets of phyllo dough in a four-inch pie tin, brushing each sheet with butter.
9. Repeat the layering process for four pans.
10. Divide equally the chicken mixture into each pan.
11. Add chives on top.
12. Fold the corners of the phyllo dough into the center.
13. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 12 minutes.
14. Transfer to serving plates and garnish with rosemary sprigs.
Yield: 4 servings
